promptStrategy.cloud: JSON-mode + a tool-listing system prompt (mirrors the production router)
promptStrategy.gemini: Gemma on the Gemini API: tool list + query in one user turn (no system role / tools), JSON reply parsed

method.scoring: tool SELECTION accuracy — exact registry tool name (normalized); irrelevance = no call. Registry examples carry no annotated args, so argument accuracy is not scored (n/a).
method.coverageNote: Cases are every registry tool's first bilingual example (EN+BG). Cloud models see the FULL tool set in context (route among all tools); small in-browser models see a retrieved candidate set (the realistic two-stage architecture).

tools.name: nationalResults
tools.description: National results for one election: votes, %, seats per party.

tools.name: regionWinners
tools.description: Results by region: the leading party in each oblast (list + map).

tools.name: parliamentSeats
tools.description: Seat composition of parliament per party (National Assembly hemicycle).

tools.name: seatsHistory
tools.description: Trend of each party's seats (MPs) across recent elections (multi-line chart, tracks renames).

tools.name: partyResult
tools.description: One party's result in one election.

tools.name: candidateResult
tools.description: A candidate's preferential-vote results by name.

tools.name: machineVoteShare
tools.description: Machine-voting share for one election.

tools.name: turnout
tools.description: Voter turnout for one election.

tools.name: compareElections
tools.description: Compare two elections.

tools.name: machineVoteSeries
tools.description: Machine-voting share across the last N elections.

tools.name: turnoutSeries
tools.description: Voter turnout across the last N elections.

tools.name: partyTimeline
tools.description: One party's vote share across all elections.

tools.name: pollAccuracy
tools.description: Polling-agency accuracy (mean error vs the election result).

tools.name: agencyProfile
tools.description: A pollster's profile: grade, error, threshold-call rate, house effect.

tools.name: latestPolls
tools.description: The latest poll by party (incl. "if elections were now").

tools.name: regionBreakdown

tools.name: municipalityBreakdown

tools.name: municipalityWinners

tools.name: settlementWinners
tools.description: Results by settlement in one municipality: the leading party in each (list + map).

tools.name: sectionWinners
tools.description: Results by polling section in a settlement: the leading party in each section.

tools.name: sectionResults
tools.description: Results in one polling section (by its number): votes and % per party + turnout.

tools.name: sectionHistory
tools.description: How one polling section (by its number) voted over time — vote share per party across elections (multi-line trend).

tools.name: settlementResults
tools.description: Results in one settlement (village/town): votes and % per party + turnout.

tools.name: settlementHistory
tools.description: How one settlement voted over time — vote share per party across elections (multi-line trend).

tools.name: municipalityResults
tools.description: Results in one municipality: votes and % per party + turnout.

tools.name: municipalityHistory
tools.description: How one municipality voted over time — vote share per party across elections (multi-line trend).

tools.name: regionResults
tools.description: Results in one region/oblast: votes and % per party + turnout (incl. Sofia city = its three MIR combined).

tools.name: regionResultsTrend
tools.description: How one region/oblast voted over time — vote share per party across elections (multi-line trend).

tools.name: settlementBreakdown
tools.description: A party's result by settlement within one municipality (map + ranking).

tools.name: electionAnomalies
tools.description: Anomaly signals for one election (recounts, machine corrections, problem sections).

tools.name: flashMemoryByParty
tools.description: Machine count vs flash-memory (СУЕМГ) difference by party — which parties gained/lost votes.

tools.name: machineVoteByParty
tools.description: Machine vs paper voting share by party — which parties vote on machines.

tools.description: Wasted votes (below the 4% threshold) by party — which parties lost the most votes.

tools.name: recountByParty
tools.description: Per-party vote change after a manual recount (only elections with a recount, e.g. Oct 2024).

tools.name: regionHistory
tools.description: Voter turnout in one oblast across all elections.

tools.name: voteTransitions
tools.description: Vote transitions between two consecutive elections (where votes moved).

tools.name: budgetTrend
tools.description: State-budget trend — revenue and spending by year (completed fiscal years).

tools.name: budgetByFunction
tools.description: Budget spending by function (COFOG).

tools.description: Spending on one budget function (e.g. health, defence, education): share + trend.

tools.name: procurementTotals
tools.description: Public procurement totals (AOP).

tools.name: fundsOverview

tools.name: noiFunds

tools.name: budgetExecution
tools.description: Monthly state-budget execution (revenue/expenditure/balance) over time.

tools.name: ministryBudget
tools.description: A specific ministry's budget by programme.

tools.name: investmentProjects
tools.description: Investment programme (Appendix III) — largest capital projects.

tools.name: governments
tools.description: Governments since 2005 — PMs, periods, parties.

tools.name: mpAssetsTop
tools.description: MPs ranked by declared assets.

tools.name: mpConnectionsTop
tools.description: MPs with the most business connections (Commerce Registry).

tools.name: mpAssetsByParty
tools.description: MP declared assets aggregated by party (average per MP).

tools.name: mpConnectionsByParty
tools.description: MP business connections aggregated by party.

tools.name: officialsAssetsTop
tools.description: Senior officials (cabinet, deputy ministers, governors) by declared assets.

tools.name: financingOverview
tools.description: Party financial reports — filing compliance (Court of Audit).

tools.name: macroIndicator
tools.description: A macro indicator over time (inflation, GDP, debt…).

tools.name: macroOverview
tools.description: Snapshot of key macro indicators.

tools.name: macroByCategory
tools.description: Indicators by theme: economy, fiscal, governance, society.

tools.name: subnationalIndicator
tools.description: A per-município indicator over time (unemployment, DZI, migration).

tools.name: rankPlaces
tools.description: Rank oblasts/municipalities by an indicator (highest/lowest, top N).

tools.name: regionIndicator
tools.description: A per-oblast (NUTS3) indicator: GDP/capita, population, migration.

tools.name: transparencyScore
tools.description: Local transparency index (LISI) for an oblast centre.

tools.name: localTaxes
tools.description: Local tax rates for a município vs the national average.

tools.name: landUse
tools.description: Land use by category (national or per oblast).

tools.name: governanceProfile
tools.description: Composite place profile: population, mayor, council, turnout, unemployment, transparency, procurement.

tools.name: comparePlaces
tools.description: Compares two places across governance indicators (population, mayor, council, unemployment, transparency…).

tools.name: census
tools.description: Demographics (Census 2021): population, gender, ethnicity.

tools.name: procurementBySettlement
tools.description: Public procurement awarded in one settlement.

tools.name: airQuality
tools.description: Air quality (PM10/PM2.5) from stations near a place.

tools.name: graoPopulation
tools.description: Registered population (GRAO) by permanent and current address.

tools.name: councilResolutions
tools.description: Municipal council resolutions (where indexed).

tools.name: problemSections
tools.description: Tracked Roma neighbourhoods ("controlled voting") — sections and leading party.

tools.name: romaVoteTrend
tools.description: Who wins the Roma vote over time — leading party in the watched neighbourhoods, by election.

tools.name: riskIndex
tools.description: Election risk index — the 0–100 headline score and its 10 components (process integrity + context).

tools.name: riskScore
tools.description: Section risk screening — sections by band (low/elevated/high/critical).

tools.name: riskClusters
tools.description: Risk clusters — adjacent flagged sections sharing a leading party.

tools.name: clusterPersistence
tools.description: Persistent risk loci — places whose risk clusters recur across elections.

tools.name: benfordAnomalies
tools.description: Benford's-law (first-digit) test per party — deviation in digit distribution.

tools.name: wastedVotes
tools.description: Wasted votes — share of votes for below-threshold parties, by oblast.

tools.name: wastedVotesTrend
tools.description: Wasted-votes trend — national share of below-threshold votes across elections.

tools.name: suspiciousSettlements
tools.description: Suspicious settlements — concentrated vote, invalid ballots, additional voters.

tools.name: diasporaVote
tools.description: Out-of-country vote (MIR 32) — results by party.

tools.name: diasporaVoteTrend
tools.description: Diaspora vote (MIR 32) trend — leading parties across elections (multi-line chart).

tools.name: voterPersistence
tools.description: Voter persistence — share of voters who stayed with the same party between two elections.

tools.name: partyDemographics
tools.description: A party's demographic correlations (Census 2021): ethnicity, religion, education, age.

tools.name: demographicCleavages
tools.description: Demographic cleavages — which metrics most divide the parties.

tools.name: mpLoyalty
tools.description: MP party loyalty — share of votes cast with the MP's group.

tools.name: mpAttendance
tools.description: MP attendance at roll-call votes.

tools.name: factionCohesion
tools.description: Faction cohesion — how uniformly the groups vote.

tools.name: mpVotingProfile
tools.description: An MP's roll-call profile by name: loyalty and attendance.

tools.name: mpSimilarity
tools.description: Which MPs vote most similarly to a given MP.

tools.name: voteSearch
tools.description: Search parliamentary votes by topic/keyword — outcome and tally.

tools.name: partyMps
tools.description: The MPs (members) of one party in the sitting National Assembly — by name.

tools.name: schoolScores
tools.description: Schools in a município by average matura (DZI) / NVO exam score.

models.label: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite
models.note: Production cloud router for the Наясно chat.

models.label: Gemma 4 31B
models.reason: Full-registry pass pending. Gemma is the BgGPT base family but has no OpenRouter quota (free tier daily-429) and no native tool API on the Gemini API, so the ~104-tool prompt goes in one user turn — which is slow/rate-limited and can hang there. On a smaller candidate set it routed strongly in both EN and BG; the full-registry pass will be added once measured with a per-call timeout.

models.label: FunctionGemma 270M (in-browser, untuned)
models.reason: Off-domain community build (no fine-tune on our tools, no grammar). Can't hold the full registry, so it's tested with a small retrieved candidate set (k=8). Even so it got 0/104 tools right in both languages (the ~2% is the irrelevance cases), barely emits valid JSON, and the wasm intermittently traps — an untuned 270M needs fine-tuning + constrained decoding before it can route at all.
